description_long: This is a sealed bag of San Carlo branded snacks, likely potato chips, with a predominantly white exterior and colorful printed graphics. The front of the bag features a large image of a golden chip, a red chili pepper, and various promotional and contest information in red and yellow. The back of the bag displays nutritional information, ingredients, and additional branding, with a small landscape image near the top. The sides of the bag are narrow and show the seam of the packaging, with some text and graphics wrapping around. The bag appears to be made of a flexible plastic or metallized film, typical for snack packaging, and is filled with air to protect the contents. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention on a store shelf or in an urban environment.
description: A white, air-filled San Carlo snack bag with colorful branding, a chip and chili graphic, and detailed nutritional and promotional information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the San Carlo logo, a large chip and chili graphic, and prominent promotional contest details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the bag and the seam, with partial text and graphics visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying nutritional information, ingredients, a small landscape image, and additional branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more text and graphics wrapping around, and the seam visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The San Carlo logo is visible on the front and back, consisting of a red rectangular background with white text, located near the top center of the bag.
attribute_flavor_indication: A red chili pepper graphic on the front suggests a spicy flavor; the word 'vivace' is also present.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the bag, including a standard nutrition facts panel.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Promotional contest graphics are present on the front, including a circular badge with 'VINCI gusto 25.000 euro' and additional contest details in red and yellow.
